overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a futuristic teal suit exploring a high-tech space facility. The character moves through a compact bathroom, walks along a curved corridor with glass walls and red accent lighting, and enters an office space with holographic displays and data monitors.

events.description: character turns and enters the bathroom area approaching the sink
exits the bathroom into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: character enters the bathroom, approaches the sink, then turns to exit into the corridor

entered.detail: white ceramic sink with metallic faucet and soap dispenser
rectangular mirror mounted above the sink reflecting the room
neatly folded white towels on the bathroom counter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow bathroom space with the character approaching a sink and mirror. The environment features clean metallic surfaces and artificial lighting. The character briefly examines the area before turning to exit through the doorway into the adjacent corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved corridor with glass walls and red accent lighting

events.description: character continues walking steadily along the curved corridor path

agents.ego_description: character walks along the curved corridor past glass-walled rooms with red floor lighting

entered.detail: transparent glass panels revealing adjacent rooms and corridors
illuminated red strips embedded in the floor providing accent lighting
door marked with number 1 leading to private quarters

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a sleek curved corridor featuring transparent glass walls that reveal other facility areas. Red accent lighting runs along the floor, contrasting with the cool teal tones of the walls. The character approaches a door marked with the number 1 at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: private office with desk and holographic displays

events.description: character enters the private office room through the marked door
character turns to examine the desk and wall-mounted displays

agents.ego_description: character enters the office and approaches the desk to examine the computer setup and holographic wall monitors

entered.detail: large curved desk with computer terminal and personal items
wall-mounted screens showing data graphs and red diagnostic text
shelf unit with colorful books and storage containers
modern adjustable lamp illuminating the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a private office space containing a large desk with a computer terminal and various personal items. The back wall features multiple holographic displays showing data visualizations. A bookshelf with colorful storage boxes lines the left wall. The character moves around the desk area examining the workspace and monitors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a compact utility area through a high-tech transit hall and into a detailed command office. It begins in a narrow bathroom with clean metallic surfaces, where the character examines a sink and mirror before turning to exit through a doorway. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a sleek curved corridor defined by transparent glass walls and contrasting red accent lighting that leads toward a door marked with the number 1. The scene then shifts into a private office, transitioning from the sterile hallway to a workspace filled with a large desk, personal items, and a bookshelf of colorful storage boxes. Finally, the camera follows the character as they explore the room, moving toward the back wall where multiple holographic displays project glowing data visualizations.
